mapper.sql: id, user_id, book_id, word_id, mastered, review_count, last_review_time, difficulty, priority, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_book_word ( user_id, book_id, word_id, mastered, review_count, last_review_time, difficulty, priority, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{bookId}, #{wordId}, #{mastered}, #{reviewCount}, #{lastReviewTime}, #{difficulty}, #{priority}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_book_word WHERE book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at ASC
SELECT FROM user_book_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY priority ASC, created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_book_word SET mastered = #{mastered}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user_book_word SET review_count = #{reviewCount}, last_review_time = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_book_word ( user_id, book_id, word_id, mastered, review_count, last_review_time, difficulty, priority, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.bookId}, #{item.wordId}, #{item.mastered}, #{item.reviewCount}, #{item.lastReviewTime}, #{item.difficulty}, #{item.priority}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_book_word WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_book_word WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_book_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND mastered = 1
